_comment: Full logs referenced by issue #1631. Stored as gist URLs because each log is MB-sized. Excerpts around the HTTP 400 failure are in data/log-excerpts.txt.

logs.observed: gh: HTTP 400 at 20:35:49Z, eventual retry success at 21:25:16Z (50 min gap)

logs.failure_site: log-upload comment (claude native binary missing — solve.mjs still tried to attach failure log, comment post failed)
logs.observed: gh: HTTP 400 at 20:43:38Z, eventual retry success at 21:26:28Z (43 min gap)
gh: HTTP 400 at 20:58:06Z, eventual retry success (CTRL+C re-entered the path)

logs.failure_site: AI Work Session Started comment (session start path)
logs.observed: gh: HTTP 400 at 20:55:25Z, eventual success at 21:28:13Z (33 min gap)

logs.failure_site: AI Work Session Started comment (near-duplicate of log-4)
logs.observed: gh: HTTP 400 at 20:56:04Z, eventual success (29 min gap)

logs.failure_site: log-upload comment (full failure — no comment posted)
logs.observed: gh: HTTP 400 at 21:05:12Z, retry gave up at 21:20:51Z with 'Failed to upload failure logs'

common_failure_mode.response_body: GitHub edge-tier HTML "Whoa there!" (generic anti-abuse rejection page, not JSON)
common_failure_mode.root_cause: src/tool-comments.lib.mjs postTrackedComment passed `{ input: payload }` but command-stream's option key is `stdin`. The unknown option was silently ignored, stdin fell back to 'inherit', and `gh api --input -` read the parent process's stdin (empty/closed), sending an empty POST body.

fix.regression_test: tests/test-solution-summary.mjs — asserts the options bag has `stdin` and does NOT have `input`
